description: 課程單元量產工廠（unit blueprint 模板化 + lint + multi-unit mockup 驗證）

tasks.desc: Freeze unit_blueprint v0.1 contract proposal: educational metadata additions and backward-safe migration rules from v0.
Define complete A1/A2 unit skeleton spec (minimum node set and sequencing requirements) for scalable production.
Implement scaffold_unit_blueprint generator for full unit skeletons (not demo-only 3-node fixtures).
Create unified mockup-check command with multi-fixture lint (schema + mixed-script + payload checks + supported forms/modes).
Authoring template pack for fixture production: payload templates, bilingual requirements, educational QA checklist.
Pilot production: expand A1-U05 into a full playable unit fixture using the standardized skeleton and checks.
Multi-unit PM trial flow and acceptance checklist (A1-U04/A1-U05 + one additional unit) using modular viewer selector.
Batch production playbook: agent assembly-line workflow (author -> lint -> PM review -> fix -> freeze).
